title: Grimoire
body:
# **Grimoire**

Adds decoration blocks and useful enchantments.
Limits the world to only generate three end strongholds.

## Building Blocks

![Showcase of Building Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45869b512f3dea84e8d4bc73812521c23185f848.png)


#### Iron Scaffolding can extend up to 96 blocks out.
![Iron Scaffolding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e953d5e79fe0b6173fd05f033d9c07f8d60f911b.png)

#### Connected Log blocks are smaller than regular blocks and can connect to solid blocks and itself.
![Connected Logs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4708b7e23aa3b455cc903ed64c380c7d6971a1dc.png)

#### Aquarium glass can be placed on edges of blocks
![Aquarium Glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1dea27b3be7a99fc03d8a4d41d2f33ccf5ab592.png)

## Enchantments

### Deathbound
Has a chance to nullify the effect of a totem of undying.

![Deathbound Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/Qmc0tCE.gif)

### Shared Blood
When striking an opponent, there is a 50% chance to absorb one of their active effects, either beneficial or harmful, for a brief duration.

![Shared Blood Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/8hCHfOJ.gif)

### Golem Shroud (To be removed in the 2.0 version)
Offers protection from all damage, but reduces your movement speed.

![Golem Shroud Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/8vNcScv.gif)


## Future | Future Updates | Soon(tm)
